description: Portable operator surfaces for Sophia AGI: skills, the verifier gate, and the MCP server, plus the per-harness install target directories. Inspired by affaan-m/ECC, which ships a single manifest + adapters portable across Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Gemini, OpenCode, Zed and Copilot. Every `source` is a real repo-relative path; see tools/install_sophia_layer.py for the DRY-RUN validator/installer.

surfaces.description: Source-discipline skill: correct authorship, tradition boundaries, myth labeling, provenance uncertainty.
Engineering discipline: think before coding, simplicity first, surgical changes, goal-driven verification.
Personality-faithful skill: keep Sophia's voice and stances consistent across harnesses.
RunPod connectivity skill for remote GPU operations.
Prompt-author skill: write precise, machine-checkable prompts for other agents with abstention paths.
MCP server config exposing the Sophia AGI server (sophia_mcp/server.py) over the Model Context Protocol.
Epistemic self-check / verifier gate that screens agent responses for source-discipline and attribution failures.
